title: clematis cylindrica var. lineariloba
intro: Clematis cylindrica var. lineariloba is a perennial plant, often referred to as a type of flowering vine in the buttercup family, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Clematis cylindrica var. lineariloba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
